changed.to: Suppose ass:acyclic-admg, ass:linear-mixed-representation, ass:connected-set-markov, ass:tde-witness, and ass:genericity hold, and in addition each witness row i_r (r=1,...,q) is a directed SOURCE in G with An(i_r)={i_r} and is bidirected-disconnected from every error node that is an ancestor of some node in P_v union {v}. Then the empty order-2 family C with C_r = empty tuple for all r belongs to Mcal_2(G,u,v,I_v,Pi_v); concretely K_X(I_v,C) = diag(kappa_epsilon(i_1,i_1),...,kappa_epsilon(i_q,i_q)) H with H_{r,s}=(B_Lambda)_{p_s,i_r} and k_X(v;I_v,C)=diag(kappa_epsilon(i_r,i_r)) b with b_r=(B_Lambda)_{v,i_r}. Consequently, on the generic model class, det K_X(I_v,C) != 0 and lambda_Pv,v = K_X(I_v,C)^{-1} k_X(v;I_v,C), so by thm:closed-form-coefficient the entire parent-effect vector of v, in particular lambda_uv, is identified by the observable ORDER-2 (covariance) determinant ratio. Hence on the source-isolated witness subclass the observable identifying functional exists UNCONDITIONALLY at covariance order (m_star=2), and prop:iv-reduction is the q=1 special case.
changed.reason: maximality addition: positive finite-order-existence theorem on the source-isolated witness subclass

directive: MAXIMALITY IMPROVEMENT (add + prove a new POSITIVE theorem; keep all existing targets and their proofs, including the two NEGATIVE OEQ resolutions, unchanged). Add and prove thm:source-isolated-covariance-admissible exactly as stated. Proof recipe (verify, do not assume): a witness row i_r that is a directed source has X_{i_r}=epsilon_{i_r}, so for any node j, kappa_X(i_r,j)=sum_t (B_Lambda)_{j,t} kappa_epsilon(i_r,t); the connected-set Markov property (i_r bidirected-disconnected from every error node ancestral to P_v union {v}) forces kappa_epsilon(i_r,t)=0 for all t != i_r that are ancestors of j, leaving kappa_X(i_r,j)=(B_Lambda)_{j,i_r} kappa_epsilon(i_r,i_r). With A_r:=kappa_epsilon(i_r,i_r) (generically nonzero by ass:genericity / finite variance), this is exactly the def:cumulant-admissible-family row factorization for the empty tuple C_r=empty at order m=2, so C in Mcal_2; then thm:cumulant-row-system and thm:closed-form-coefficient give the covariance-order determinant ratio identifying lambda_Pv,v (hence lambda_uv). Reuse lem:admissible-row-factorization, lem:witness-transfer-identity, lem:witness-minor-invertible. Do NOT weaken any assumption or strengthen the headline beyond this subclass; this ADDS a positive subclass theorem generalizing prop:iv-reduction to arbitrary q. Approved after codex maximality adjudication.
